name: wiki
description: LLM Wiki Knowledge Base — source documents to interlinked Markdown wiki with trust scoring and gap detection

interface.shortDescription: Build and maintain LLM-powered knowledge bases from any source
interface.longDescription: Compiles source documents (URLs, files, articles, git repositories) into an interlinked Markdown wiki with wikilink cross-references, trust scoring, gap detection, and automated quality linting. Supports domain knowledge extraction from source code via the discover workflow. Provides init, ingest, compile, query, lint, discover, and cycle operations.
defaultPrompt: Initialize a new wiki in this project.
Ingest this URL into the wiki.
What does the wiki know about this topic?
Run a full wiki cycle (ingest → compile → lint).
